message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

interface "CarPart" {
    + PrintPart()
    + AddPart(v interface{})
    - RemovePart(v interface{})
}


class CylinderBlock <<C>> {}
class Sump <<C>> {}
class Crankshaft <<C>> {}
class Rod <<C>> {}
class Engine <<C>> { Container: list.List }
class Car <<C>> {Container: list.List}



Absorber :<< C >> 
Damping :<< C >>  
Stabilizer :<< C >>   
Rack :<< C >>    
Lever :<< C >>     
Spring :<< C >>   

Suspension :<< C >>{Container:list.list}




Engine --> CylinderBlock
Sump-->Engine
Rod..>Engine
Crankshaft->Engine 

'engine to carpart
Engine ..|> CarPart 


'Suspention part connections
'Rod -> Suspension
'Damper -> suspension
'stabiliser bar connection
absorber -- suspention
damping--suspention
stabalizier-suspenion
rack- suspseniton
lever---suspesntioin
spring----supepnsiotn

car-part |... engine
car-parts.... suespentoin
@enduml
